text:
じつは、必要なものがあるんだけど
ショップエリアでは売ってなくて。
地球なら売ってるのに……

欲しいのは「毛糸」なんだけど……
なにか、代わりになるものでもいいの。
わけあって、急ぎで必要なのよ。

……彼氏に、とかじゃないからね？
コオリとアルに、マフラーをと思って。
でも、ふたりには内緒にしといて。

え、毛糸みたいなものがあるから
探しに行ってきてくれる……？
ありがとう……！

ヒツギちゃんがコソコソ話してる……
でもカレシじゃないって……あっ！
も、もしかして……カノジョ！？

コオリ、こわいから
早口でぶつぶつ言わ

There's something I really need to get
my hands on, but they don't sell it in
the Shopping Plaza. It'd be easy to get
on Earth, but...

What I'm after is some yarn, but if I can't get
that, do you think you can find anything that
might work just the same? I need it ASAP.

And not because I have a boyfriend now or
anything, okay? I just wanted to make scarves
for Kohri and Al. But don't tell them that!

What? You think you know what might work?
You'll go get some for me? Oh, thank you!

So she's being all secretive, but she says she
doesn't have a boyfriend... Unless...
C-Could she have a girlfriend!?

Can you stop muttering to yourself like that?
It's kinda scary...
